ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., IND, IDN) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs (e.g., South Asia, East Asia & Pacific) */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region to which the country belongs (e.g., Southern Asia, Southeastern Asia) */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., High income, Lower middle income) */,
  "iso_alpha_3" TEXT /* ISO alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "iso_numeric" INTEGER /* ISO numeric code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code for the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_year" TEXT /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic series (e.g., GDP per capita, Government expenditure) */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code of the economic series (e.g., NY.GDP.PCAP.CD, NE.CON.GOVT.ZS) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the economic series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Year the series began */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Year the series ended */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_series_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic series the data belongs to */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the economic data (e.g., US$, %) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data point */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES economic_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., GDP, Government Expenditure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., US$, %) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., World Bank, University of Economics) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the user's information */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
